data.name: NoLogoText
data.comment: Text shown when service logo is not available

data.name: ImportFromServiceTitle
data.comment: Modal title for importing from a service. {0} is placeholder for service name

data.name: UploadExportFileText
data.comment: Text for file upload instruction. {0} is placeholder for service name

data.name: CancelButton
data.comment: Cancel button text

data.name: BackButton
data.comment: Back button text

data.name: NextButton
data.comment: Next button text

data.name: ImportButton
data.comment: Import button text

data.name: ImportFoldersLabel
data.comment: Checkbox label for importing folder structure from the source password manager

data.name: FoldersDetected
data.comment: Info text showing number of folders detected in the import. {0} is the count

data.name: ImportAttachmentsLabel
data.comment: Checkbox label for importing file attachments detected in the source export

data.name: AttachmentsDetected
data.comment: Info text showing number of attachments detected and their total size. {0} is the count, {1} is the human-readable size (e.g. "3.9 MB")

data.name: DuplicateCredentialsWarning
data.value: A rendszer {0} dupla bejegyzést talált, és importálja azokat.
data.comment: Warning text when duplicate credentials are detected. {0} is the count

data.name: NoNewCredentials
data.comment: Warning text when no new credentials are available for import

data.name: PreviewInstructions
data.value: Ellenőrizze a következő észlelt bejegyzéseket a folytatás előtt:
data.comment: Instructions shown before the credential preview table

data.name: ServiceColumn
data.comment: Column header for service name in credential preview table

data.name: UsernameColumn
data.comment: Column header for username in credential preview table

data.name: PasswordColumn
data.comment: Column header for password in credential preview table

data.name: MoreCredentials
data.comment: Text showing additional credentials not displayed. {0} is the count

data.name: ExtractFaviconsLabel
data.comment: Checkbox label for favicon extraction option

data.name: ConfirmImportText
data.value: Biztosan importálni akar ({0}) bejegyzést? Figyelem: az importálási folyamat eltarthat egy ideig.
data.comment: Confirmation text before importing. {0} is the credential count

data.name: FaviconExtractionNote
data.value: Megjegyzés: Az ikonok letöltése be van kapcsolva. Ez a folyamat több percig is eltarthat a weboldallal ellátott bejegyzések mennyiségétől függően. Kérem hagyja az oldalt nyitva.
data.comment: Warning note about favicon extraction duration

data.name: ExtractingFavicons
data.comment: Progress text during favicon extraction. {0} is current progress, {1} is total

data.name: SavingCredentials
data.comment: Progress text during credential save. {0} is current progress, {1} is total

data.name: SyncingVault
data.comment: Progress text when syncing vault to server after import

data.name: ImportSuccessMessage
data.comment: Success message after import completes. {0} is the credential count

data.name: ImportErrorGeneric
data.value: Egy hiba lépett fel az importálás során. Kérem próbálja újra.
data.comment: Generic error message when import fails

data.name: ImportErrorInvalidFile
data.value: Válasszon ki egy megfelelő export fájlt az importáláshoz.
data.comment: Error message when invalid file is selected

data.name: ImportErrorZipFile
data.value: Kérem tömörítse ki az export zip fájlt importálás előtt. További információkért tekintse meg a lenti utasításokat.
data.comment: Error message when user tries to import a zip file

data.name: ImportErrorUnsupportedFormat
data.value: Nem támogatott fájl formátum. Támogatott formátumok: {0}
data.comment: Error message when user selects an unsupported file format. {0} is the list of supported extensions

data.name: ImportErrorFileTooLarge
data.value: A fájl mérete nagyobb a megengedett {0}MB-nál.
data.comment: Error message when file is too large. {0} is the maximum allowed size in megabytes

data.name: EncryptedFilePasswordPrompt
data.value: A fájl titkosított. Adja meg a jelszót, amit az exportálásnál használt.
data.comment: Prompt for encrypted file password

data.name: DecryptionPasswordLabel
data.comment: Label for decryption password input

data.name: DecryptionPasswordHint
data.value: Ez az a jelszó, amit megad a titkosított (.avex fájl) export létrehozásnál, nem pedig a mester jelszava.
data.comment: Hint explaining what password is needed

data.name: DecryptAndContinueButton
data.comment: Button text for decryption

data.name: DecryptingFile
data.comment: Progress text during decryption

data.name: IncorrectPasswordError
data.comment: Error message for incorrect decryption password

data.name: DecryptionErrorGeneric
data.value: A fájl dekódolása sikertelen. Kérem ellenőrizze, hogy hibás e a fájl, és próbálja újra.
data.comment: Generic error message for decryption failure

data.name: supportedFormats
data.comment: Label for supported file formats

data.name: ImportErrorDetailsIntro
data.value: Kérem másolja ki a lenti értékeket, és ossza meg ezeket a hiba bejelentésnél.
data.comment: Intro line shown above the copyable error diagnostic block when an import fails

data.name: ImportErrorCopyDetailsButton
data.comment: Button label to copy the error diagnostic block to the clipboard

data.name: ImportErrorShowDetailsButton
data.comment: Button label that reveals the error diagnostic block in an inline read-only textarea

data.name: ImportErrorHideDetailsButton
data.comment: Button label that hides the error diagnostic block again (shown when the block is currently expanded)

data.name: ImportPartialFailureWarning
data.value: {0} elemet nem lehetett elemezni, ezért átugrásra kerülnek.
data.comment: Warning shown in the preview step when some items failed to parse. {0} is the count of failed items
